title: Platform Rules
intro: These Rules supplement the TyPlace User Agreement and establish the main requirements for user conduct, listing placement, transactions, and the use of platform functions. Under the platform’s launch model, the buyer pays only for a specific order, the amount related to the transaction is held within that transaction until completion, refund, or dispute resolution, and after the transaction is completed the seller becomes eligible for payout. The list of violations and possible measures is not exhaustive.

rule1.title: 1.1. Circumventing the platform and moving a transaction outside TyPlace
rule1.violation: It is prohibited to exchange contact details, encourage moving to third-party messengers, transfer payment, perform an order, discuss a dispute, or agree on material transaction terms outside TyPlace if this is used to bypass the payment procedure for a specific transaction, the safe transaction mechanism, the platform fee, support, or the recording of agreements on the platform.
rule1.measure: The platform may delete messages, restrict account functions, cancel an order, limit seller payout availability, temporarily block an account, or impose a permanent block in the event of repeated, serious, or intentional violations.

rule2.title: 1.2. Abuse of reviews, disputes, and requests
rule2.violation: It is prohibited to manipulate reviews, pressure the other party, blackmail with a review, create fake transactions for reputation purposes, submit false complaints, or abuse the system of disputes, appeals, and support requests.
rule2.measure: The platform may delete a review, close a request without satisfaction, restrict access to review and request functions, and also issue a warning, a temporary block, or a permanent block.

rule3.title: 1.3. Toxic behavior, spam, and abuse of chats
rule3.violation: Spam, flooding, threats, insults, harassment, hate speech, intrusive advertising, fraudulent messages, manipulation, and any other behavior that disrupts normal communication on the platform are prohibited.
rule3.measure: The platform may remove content, restrict message sending, restrict certain functions, issue a warning, or impose a temporary or permanent account block.

rule4.title: 1.4. Disclosure of others’ information and abuse of access
rule4.violation: It is prohibited to publish, transfer, or use personal, payment-related, confidential, or other sensitive information about users and third parties without sufficient grounds, or to use such information to the detriment of others.
rule4.measure: The platform may remove content, restrict functions, block an account, restrict transaction-related actions, and apply other protective measures depending on the seriousness of the violation.

rule1.title: 2.1. Sale, transfer, and use of TyPlace accounts
rule1.violation: The purchase, sale, transfer, rental, or shared use of TyPlace accounts is prohibited, as is creating multiple accounts to bypass blocks, limits, restrictions, or platform rules.
rule1.measure: The platform may restrict related accounts, block one or more accounts, restrict operations, and apply other security measures.

rule2.title: 2.2. Inaccurate and misleading listings
rule2.violation: It is prohibited to post listings with false descriptions, hidden conditions, inaccurate pricing, false availability of goods or services, or other information capable of misleading a buyer.
rule2.measure: The platform may hide, deactivate, or remove a listing, restrict the posting of new listings, cancel the related transaction, issue a warning, or impose a temporary or permanent block.

rule3.title: 2.3. Mass duplication and catalog cluttering
rule3.violation: Meaningless duplication of listings, spam listings, artificial catalog cluttering, and abuse of identical or nearly identical offers without reasonable necessity are prohibited.
rule3.measure: The platform may remove or deactivate listings, restrict the publication of new listings, restrict seller functions, and apply other measures depending on the scale of the violation.

rule4.title: 2.4. Refusal to participate in good faith in a transaction and dispute
rule4.violation: A seller may not, without sufficient grounds, evade fulfilling a paid order, ignore significant messages regarding an active transaction, refuse to participate in a dispute in good faith, or provide knowingly false information during the review of an order.
rule4.measure: The platform may issue a refund for the order, restrict the use of seller functions, limit seller payout availability, hide listings, and temporarily or permanently restrict the account.

rule1.title: 3.1. Illegal, stolen, and fraudulent digital items
rule1.violation: The sale, purchase, posting, or transfer of digital goods, accounts, access credentials, currency, items, services, and other objects obtained unlawfully or connected with hacking, deception, theft, fraud, or unauthorized access is prohibited.
rule1.measure: The platform may remove content, cancel or restrict related operations, limit seller payout availability, block an account, and apply other security measures.

rule2.title: 3.2. Hacking, phishing, carding, malware, and similar practices
rule2.violation: Offers related to hacking, phishing, carding, malicious software, bypassing protection, exploit services, obtaining unauthorized access, or facilitating such actions are prohibited.
rule2.measure: The platform may immediately remove the relevant content, restrict the account, restrict operations, and impose a permanent block without prior warning.

rule3.title: 3.3. Personal data, documents, and confidential information
rule3.violation: The sale, distribution, exchange, or publication of personal data, documents, payment information, databases, details, and other confidential information is prohibited if it violates third-party rights, platform rules, or security requirements.
rule3.measure: The platform may remove content, restrict functions, block an account, and apply other measures necessary to protect users and the platform.

rule4.title: 3.4. Other unacceptable content and offers
rule4.violation: Erotic or pornographic offers, dangerous or unacceptable digital services, and other goods, services, and materials that the platform considers incompatible with the safe and lawful operation of the service are prohibited.
rule4.measure: The platform may remove content, deactivate listings, restrict account functions, and impose a temporary or permanent block.

section4.title: 4. Consequences of Violations and Special Cases

rule1.title: 4.1. Seller actions causing harm to the buyer
rule1.violation: If, due to the seller’s actions or inaction, the buyer receives a block, restriction, loss of a digital object, loss of access, or another significant negative result within the subject of the transaction, the platform may take this into account when reviewing a dispute or request.
rule1.measure: Depending on the circumstances, the platform may issue a full or partial refund under the platform rules, restrict seller functions, hide the seller’s listings, limit seller payout availability, and apply other measures.

rule2.title: 4.2. Individual assessment of the seriousness of a violation
rule2.violation: The assessment of a violation depends on the nature of the user’s actions, the user’s behavior history, the degree of risk to the platform, the amount of possible damage, and the existence of repeated or intentional violations.
rule2.measure: The platform may apply measures individually, including a warning, content removal, function restrictions, transaction cancellation, temporary restriction of payout availability, temporary blocking, or permanent blocking of an account.

footerNote: Each dispute and each violation is reviewed by the platform individually, taking into account the circumstances of the specific situation.
